channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: RSPB Advises Temporary Bird Feeder Break to Prevent Disease Spread
item.description: The Royal Society for the Protection of Birds (RSPB) has issued new guidance urging gardeners to refrain from feeding birds between May 1st and October 31st to mitigate the spread of trichomonosis, a ...

item.title: China's Investments Continue While Asia Faces Reduced Financial Advantage
item.description: The news article discusses the current trends of Chinese capital investments and their impact on Asia. Despite continued inflows of capital from China, Asian countries are losing some of the economic ...

item.title: Boosting Young Women's Access to Formal Employment in Africa
item.description: By 2028, Africa is expected to see a major shift in employment for young women, with the services sector overtaking agriculture as the main employer. According to the Africa Youth Employment Outlook 2...

item.title: Veteran Politician and Former Punjab Governor Sardar Zulfiqar Ali Khosa Passes Away at 90 in Lahore
item.description: Lahore: Senior Pakistani politician and former Governor of Punjab, Sardar Zulfiqar Ali Khosa, passed away on Thursday at the age of 90 in Lahore. His family confirmed the news, stating that he was und...

item.title: NIMR Workers Strike Over Disputed Retirement Policy

item.title: Scottish Rappers Who Deceived the Music Industry
item.description: The story follows a duo of Scottish rappers who managed to infiltrate the American music industry by presenting themselves as Californian artists. Despite their origins in Scotland, their music and pe...

item.title: Artemis II mission highlights choices shaping the future of lunar exploration
item.description: The Artemis II mission marks humanity’s return to lunar exploration, with four astronauts completing a loop around the Moon and capturing stunning images from the far side. Beyond the technical achiev...

item.title: Senate Democrat Calls for Trump's Removal, Joins Effort to Impeach Over Iran Actions
item.description: Senator Andy Kim (D-N.J.) has added his voice to a growing number of Democrats calling for President Donald Trump's removal from office, citing his handling of the Iran conflict. Kim described Trump a...

item.title: More South Africans are turning to weight loss medication as awareness grows
item.description: Weight loss drugs like Ozempic, Wegovy, and Mounjaro are becoming increasingly popular in South Africa, with a new study revealing that one in 20 South Africans are either using or considering these t...

item.title: Single mother in Kisumu builds a brighter future for her daughters after early marriage and hardship
item.description: At just 17 years old, Linah Naz Okeno from Kisumu became both a wife and a mother, a turning point that threw her into a life filled with struggle and tough lessons. Now at 35, she proudly raises her ...

item.title: Caufield Achieves Historic 50-Goal Season for Montreal Canadiens
item.description: Montreal Canadiens forward Cole Caufield etched his name into franchise history on Thursday, April 9, 2026, by scoring his 50th goal of the season against the Tampa Bay Lightning. The milestone, achie...

item.title: Palestinian activist Mahmoud Khalil faces likely deportation after immigration appeal dismissed
item.description: The Board of Immigration Appeals in the United States has denied Palestinian activist and former Columbia University student Mahmoud Khalil’s attempt to dismiss his deportation case, marking a crucial...

item.title: Marilyn Gladu joins Liberals, citing benefits for her riding and personal alignment
item.description: Longtime Conservative MP Marilyn Gladu has officially crossed the floor to join the Liberal Party, describing the move as beneficial for both her riding in Sarnia and herself personally. She made the ...

item.title: Carlton experiments with lineup changes but struggles continue
item.description: Carlton attempted to shake things up in their AFL match against Adelaide by adjusting their player lineup and midfield structure. Coach Michael Voss made the surprising decision to drop last year’s be...

item.title: Blitz courts aim to reduce Crown Court backlog with fast-track hearings
item.description: Nottingham Crown Court is piloting 'blitz courts' to address the mounting backlog of criminal cases in England and Wales. These sessions allow judges to hear multiple cases in a single day, rather tha...

item.title: Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri discusses Indo-U.S. ties with Secretary of State Marco Rubio ahead of his visit to India
item.description: India’s Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri held a productive meeting with the U.S. Secretary of State, Marco Rubio, during his three-day visit to Washington, D.C. The discussions were centred on strengthe...

item.title: WHO warns of critical shortage of medical supplies in Lebanon amid ongoing Israeli strikes
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has cautioned that hospitals in Lebanon may run out of vital trauma care supplies within days, as Israeli airstrikes continue to cause mass casualties across the co...

item.title: Alberta separatist lawyer challenges First Nations' legal objections to independence petition
item.description: Alberta separatist lawyer Jeffrey Rath defended a provincial independence petition during hearings before Justice Shaina Leonard, urging the dismissal of legal challenges brought by three First Nation...

item.title: Melania Trump Denies Involvement with Jeffrey Epstein in White House Statement
item.description: A statement delivered by former First Lady Melania Trump at the White House addressed previous allegations and reports concerning her relationship with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. The stat...

item.title: Understanding Knee Injections for Osteoarthritis: A Look at the Evidence
item.description: Knee osteoarthritis, a common ailment affecting over 8% of Australians, can lead to pain and mobility issues. While injections like corticosteroids, hyaluronic acid, platelet-rich plasma (PRP), and st...
